title: Small Tetra Additions
description: This addon adds support for the materials and tools from a variety of mods to Tetra.
body:
This addon mod adds tetra support to materials and tools from the following mods: Alex's Mobs,  Aquaculture, Autumnity, Born in Chaos, L Enders Cataclysm, Chasms and Caverns, Create:Crafts&Additions, Create:Dreams&Desires, Embers:Rekindled, Enigmatic legacy, Ice and Fire: Dragons, Immersive Engineering, Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty, Mekanism, Nether's Delight, Spelunkery, Thermal Expansion, Unusual Prehistory, and Upgrade Aquatic. 

Outside these mods, it currently also adds vanilla cactus as a wood, with innate bleeding effect.

I also disable the twilight forest compat added by tetranomicon if that is installed, so that it does not conflict with tetracelium.

This mod requires both Tetra and Mickelus's own compat mod Tetracelium to be installed; certain materials are supported by adding tags to them so that Tetracelium will support them, because I prefer to use the creator's vision wherever possible. Additionally, I try to make it compatible with Tetranomicon, but other tetra addons are not explicitly supported.

Feel free to comment with any suggestions you have!
